methodology.official_series: risk_temperature.csv remains official close only and is not backfilled with weak daily option data.
methodology.estimated_series: Estimated rows use OK realtime AVIX when official daily AVIX is missing or rejected.
methodology.non_avix_factors: Index-derived realized volatility, drawdown, turnover and index-breadth proxy are recomputed from available close data; missing stock breadth remains flagged.
methodology.chart_rule: The website renders official close as a solid line and estimated close as a dashed line.
